column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
This storm is really packing a punch down here in Pinellas Point ... Winds and rain are really strong here now.
yes here in Gulfport - boats are beached and the pier has been badly damaged. The winds were way to strong for the anchor lines to hold out there. I'm curious what the highest wind gusts were...
we are just north of skyway bridge exit and the winds here were 75 mph last night. Crazy!

I kept hearing 40 mph winds on the news...that wasn't even close to what we were getting on the ground. Seems odd they didn't close the skyway much sooner. It has to be treacherous our on top of that bridge.
It is the same in west St. Petersburg, too. I was just outside and the winds are very high, gusting to the 800- 100 m. p. h. above 100 feet above ground. I estimate. Wow!
Winds / rain so much stronger in Williston. My poor horses!
Can’t sleep with this weather, stay safe everyone
neither can I. 🙃
me either all this wind and rain one of my awning fell down now it's banging against my trailer
I know. 😔
my husband is asleep but not I.
same. Snoring away...lol
and no electric as of 10 minutes ago.
same here.
oh no. Be safe.
Thanks, grateful for solar/rechargeable phone charger, lamps, and lantern.
I’m sorry!
Manatee/Sarasota county hasn’t stopped with tornando warnings today
truth!!
must be close to 10 today!

This is the longest storm I’ve been through in years it’s never ending. It’s been raining since early Sunday morning. Any idea when it’s suppose to end? The tornado and flood warnings are just as endless. I sure hope everyone is safe. Looking forward to this one being over
I hate tornado warnings, especially at night!

yea it woke me up in
Palmetto 😌
I just got one for flash flooding

me too
Wide ⏰ awake
im definitely gonna be up keeping an eye on everything. I can’t sleep through the storms lol

A couple of lightning strikes were too close for comfort. One flashed in my kitchen, lifted me off of my sofa, and blew some breakers. I’m a Florida native and survived Andrew’s wrath, but this one is different than any I can remember. Stay safe, everyone.
are you saying you think this is comparable to Andrew?
no
Not at all. It’s different than any I can remember. Andrew devastated everything in its path with horrible winds. This frequent lightning is what seems a bit unusual.

gotcha. I misunderstood the wording.
We're getting lightning now and I too thought it was odd before I saw your reply so I get what you mean.
I know they are nowhere near the same. Thanks though.
You are the best Denis Phillips!
Just heard pops
That area has been active today

Stay safe, Denis Phillips and everyone everyone being affected by this storm.
Thanks for keeping us updated, Denis and crew. We greatly appreciate y'all!
How is Fort Lauderdale looking this evening? Flight landed in Miami trying to drive to Fort Lauderdale. Should we wait until tomorrow or is it safe?
there's nothing happening in FLL/MIA. This storm is on the west coast, not the east.
that's happening over here on our side (west coast) of the state. Miami radar is basically completely clear.
you can always chat here if you're lonely
Lots of lightning and no power here in Dunedin
This is the craziest storm I’ve seen in my entire life and I’m a native

I agree. Born and raised in South Tampa. The craziest storm I've seen too. These heavy rain bands and wind gusts are crazy. I read earlier and obviously things can change but living inland said we wouldn't have the rain and wind like other areas and yet we have had torrential rains and winds in and off all day. Still its weird and unbelievable out there. We are in Carrollwood.
I'm in ocala. Lots of rain.
been here 40 years and yes!!! Your right!!
ditto. I just had a hurricane shutter ripped off my house. .Bizarre. Mini tornado?
been here almost 4 yrs from NJ! Told hubby tonight I don’t think I want to live in Fl anymore! This storm is giving me panic attacks! 😫😫😫

Wow, just scary stuff! Stay safe! This storm is going crazy. Never a went so much torrential raining in my life. Wondering how much we got her her Carrollwood area, which is Northwest area of Tampa. Its been absolutely insane raining here. It will stop for a few then start up again. The winds are whats keeping me up. Its pelting against our windows. My husband is sound asleep me sitting here worried since we're in a Flash Flood warning and Tornado watch until 5am.
we’re here from NJ. I’m stressed out. I’ll take a blizzard over this any day. Very nerve wracking.
that’s the sad part I moved here cause snow storms were making my anxiety so bad and hubby said the west coast of Fl was the safest from hurricanes ! Now all I want to do is move ! 😢😫
I’ve been coming here as my 2nd home for over 12 years. This is the worse I’ve seen. This is a very unusual storm. She’s moving extremely slow.
It's still crazy here for hours in SW Largo. High winds!!
absolutely relentless!
I know!! It won't end
Even still now!
When is this ending for Hillsborough county?
morning I believe
what are the implications for Tallahassee? when will it hit there?
will make land fall there about 8 am...
I think they said it will make landfall at 8am
thank uou
thank you! My daughter is at fsu and she needs to get home (Palm coast) so I’m trying to figure out if/when she could leave tally tomorrow
Does Rule #7 apply yet?!
My roof is leaking all along the front ugh 😩 times like this I’m glad I rent.
Stay safe everyone just landed in Tampa
What time will this tornado warning end
Hi Patricia, I did not get an alert on this one. Looks like it is above us.
thanks you
I'm wondering when the next update will be?
Where do I access Denis Phillips’ chat?
click on his picture with a red circle, next to his name
thank you!
Prayers 🙏 ❤️
We should be done in the Tampa Bay by now??
Bradenton/Lakewood Ranch?
Put my pups collars/tags on in case wind damage lets them out
Hmmmm. I live in this area and no warnings on my phone. How close does it have to be to you to sent out a warning.
I’m wondering the same thing. I have been searching for more info but there is no mention of a tornado warning anywhere else. It’s strange.
our phones have been going off all night saying to take cover!!
same
I just keep getting 500 flash flood alerts. All day long. Guess we’re just a smidge too far from the tornado zone (thankfully). Stay safe! ❤️
Marie are your location services on and set to "Always" on your weather app?
I live in Parrish and I do not like this one bit!
That area has been tornado warning haven all day.

Are we done
Yet in St Pete and St Pete Beach ?
Why aren't we getting tornado alerts from NWS?
I was wondering same.
Exactly I didn't receive any
my phone has been going off all night with alerts
I got the flood warnings. Just not the tornado warnings last night. 🤷‍♀️
Hudson here. Been without power since 845p
Horrible Wind gusts here outside of Dade City!! 😬🤪
same here in bradenton
Please cover crystal River
you need to Follow Denis Phillips here on Facebook for the best updated storm info. Stay safe. I love you
Wide awake 😫
Ugh these tornados are the worst part. Especially at night. 😳
Is it GANNA rain 🌧!?!?!?
Is it going to circle back around near IRB?
No, it's further up now heading to the panhandle of Florida. We are under tornado warning until 5am.
I don’t think so …thank you!
stay safe ☮️
Hi Denis . What is the name of the App you recommend? Thank you for everything
Storm Shield
thank you !!! 😊
you might be referring to the ABC Action News App. That’s the one I downloaded.
ABC Storm Shield
thank you so much !
thank you!!
thanks, I don’t have that one.
3rd one in last 6 hrs?
What about PH? I’m off Omaha
Right on us in Parrish. Omg
be safe
get back to your house!
I am in the drive way
All good so far
Mercy!!!!!! 😭
